publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-06-29 00:01:23 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Records documenting the administration of the Cornell University English Department.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records include office, committee, and personnel files; memos; student records; examinations, including an 1891 entrance examination; English scholarship and fellowship materials including lists of winners; selected records of the Freshman Humanities Program; correspondence; pamphlets; minutes of faculty meetings (1946-1957); and records of the department chairman, 1948-1968.

English Department lectures presented Monday, January 29, 2007 at Hollis E. Cornell Auditorium, Goldwin Smith Hall, Cornell University: Sandra M. Gilbert, "Finding Atlantis: Thirty Years of Exploring Women's Literary Traditions" and M.H. Abrams, "On Reading Poetry Aloud."

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University English Department records, #14-12-1227. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to departmental records restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Presented Monday, January 29, 2007 at Hollis E. Cornell Auditorium, Goldwin Smith Hall, Cornell University: Sandra M. Gilbert, "Finding Atlantis: Thirty Years of Exploring Women's Literary Traditions" and M.H. Abrams, "On Reading Poetry Aloud."

did.unittitle: Minutes of the meetings of the Department of English
Memos concerning the medical insurance program at Cornell
Lists of PhDs. and dissertation topics
Honors Program seminars, lists of students in Honors Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell - Glasgow Exchange Fellowship, Woodrow Wilson Fellowship, Post War Fellowships in Humanities

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Faculty Fellowships (Ford Foundation), Olmstead Scholarship, Class of 1916 Fellowship

did.unittitle: Fellowships and scholarships lists of elected
Graduate program faculty meetings, memos about reform

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Coit Tyler, Jo Stafford, Martin Wright, Morrison Poetry Price, Rogers Peet Advertising Prize.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Manuscript Club Contest, Guilford Essay Prize, Folder Library Prize, Cornell Dramatic Club Playwriting, Corson Browning Prize, Bess Berlow Cohan.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arts Festival, Fellowship, Committee on Graduate Work, Graduate Study, Special Committee on the Conduct of Exams.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: General Committee, Ph.D Major - Minor Sub-committee, Graduate Training Sub-committee

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Graduate Committee, Registration and Schedules Committee, Faculty Research Grants

did.unittitle: Social Sciences course Dowd, Lyons, Condry
Freshman Writing Seminar brochure and John S. Knight Writing Program booklet
Class books, with schedules and grades for English Department courses taught by O. F. Emerson. Includes note to Professor White from B.S. Monroe donating them to the library.
